name: Clopidogrel 75mg
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
uses: Prevention of atherosclerotic events in MI, stroke, or peripheral arterial disease
how_it_works: Irreversibly blocks the P2Y12 ADP receptor on platelets, preventing platelet activation and aggregation.
food_interactions: Take with food to reduce GI upset
what_to_avoid: Never stop without cardiologist approval — risk of stent thrombosis
